text: As I stand in this brightly lit, modern hallway and gaze through the glass into a room of bold colors and futuristic design, a sense of curiosity washes over me. The clear division between open space and enclosed ideas reminds me how boundaries shape knowledge. I feel anticipation—on the cusp of discovery, drawn toward the energy of innovation that pulses from the display ahead. The environment is clinical yet inspiring, suggesting the perpetual motion of thought and invention.
